name: KL CYC L

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: DDA0AA4F-EE1F-49FB-98A8-3B46C47DE84C

comment:
The KL CYC L is the perfect fixture for smooth and evenly illuminated cyclorama, set or wall washing application. It utilizes a carefully crafted asymmetrical reflector design to achieve perfect blends while covering significant heights with ease.

Designed with an incredibly low profile housing the KL CYC L is also the ideal choice for footlight positions, providing excellent versatility for stage, film, television and event lighting use.
